svg.title: SciResearchKit logo (animated)
svg.desc: SciResearchKit logo: a dark-navy graduation cap with a tassel on its left, sitting on a large circle enclosing a line-drawn microscope with a small red-checkmark seal, above the SciResearchKit wordmark. Animated: mark slides in, red checkmark draws in, wordmark fades up. Falls back to static for reduced-motion users.
